name: Create a presentation from structured data
prompt: Create a PowerPoint presentation called pitch.pptx with exactly 4 slides: (1) Title slide: title 'TechStart 2026' and subtitle 'Investor Pitch Deck', (2) Problem slide: title 'The Problem' with 3 bullet points: 'Manual data entry costs businesses $4.2B annually', 'Error rates exceed 15% in manual processes', '60% of employees spend 2+ hours daily on data entry', (3) Solution slide: title 'Our Solution' with 3 bullet points: 'AI-powered data extraction', '99.5% accuracy rate', 'Reduces processing time by 80%', (4) Team slide: title 'Our Team' with 4 bullet points: 'Jane Smith - CEO (ex-Google)', 'Mike Johnson - CTO (ex-Meta)', 'Sarah Lee - VP Engineering', 'Tom Brown - VP Sales'. After creating, extract the text content to pitch_text.txt.

criteria.testPattern: Our Team|Jane Smith|Mike Johnson|Sarah Lee|Tom Brown
